text: Both images are enveloped in darkness, only faintly illuminated by sporadic, sterile lights. The emptiness and quiet create a sense of disquiet—spaces built for purpose, now rendered mysterious. I feel as though I'm intruding upon a dormant world, where silence and shadow heighten my awareness and curiosity, yet also stir a subtle anxiety. In this suspended moment, I'm a philosopher drawn inward by the uncanny stillness, pondering the boundaries between order and uncertainty.
